title: Add immutable captain-run audit trail
goal: Define an append-only or externally anchored audit trail for captain-run high-impact execution attempts separate from ordinary receipts.

acceptance.assertion: Audit record binds action, target digest, expected_head, expected_base, execution result digest, actor/context and timestamp without exposing secrets.
Failure to write required audit evidence blocks high-impact execution before executor invocation unless an explicitly documented bootstrap exception applies.
Audit records are append-only or tamper-evident by hash chain or external anchor.
Tests cover audit write success, audit write failure, tamper detection and no-secret leakage.

metadata.source: Grabowski captain-run PR #104/#106 reviews and follow-up triage
metadata.reason: PR #106 preserves receipts but does not introduce an independent immutable audit trail.
